cet4: The government decided to implement a new policy to reduce pollution.
cet4zh: 政府决定实施一项新政策来减少污染。
cs: We need to implement this interface before the next sprint review.
cszh: 我们需要在下次冲刺评审之前实现这个接口。

def: v. 维持，保持；维修，保养
cet4: It is important to maintain a healthy lifestyle.
cet4zh: 保持健康的生活方式很重要。
cs: The legacy system is expensive to maintain, so we're planning a migration.
cszh: 这个旧系统维护成本很高，所以我们正在计划迁移。

cet4: She was the strongest candidate for the position.
cet4zh: 她是这个职位最强的候选人。
cs: The algorithm picks the best candidate from the search results.
cszh: 算法从搜索结果中选出最佳候选。

def: n. 进入；使用权 v. 访问，存取
cet4: Students have access to the library 24 hours a day.
cet4zh: 学生可以全天 24 小时使用图书馆。
cs: You need admin access to modify the database configuration.
cszh: 你需要管理员权限才能修改数据库配置。

cet4: The campaign was designed to promote environmental awareness.
cet4zh: 这场活动旨在推广环保意识。
cs: The function promotes the local variable to the heap when escaping.
cszh: 当变量逃逸时，函数会将其从局部变量提升到堆上。

cet4: This project will consume a large amount of resources.
cet4zh: 这个项目将消耗大量资源。
cs: The consumer thread will consume messages from the queue asynchronously.
cszh: 消费者线程会异步地从队列中消费消息。

def: n. 问题；期刊 v. 发行，发布
cet4: The government is dealing with the issue of unemployment.
cet4zh: 政府正在处理失业问题。
cs: Please open an issue on GitHub if you find a bug in the parser.
cszh: 如果你在解析器中发现了 bug，请在 GitHub 上提交 issue。

def: n. 过程，流程 v. 处理，加工
cet4: Learning a language is a long process.
cet4zh: 学习语言是一个漫长的过程。
cs: The server spawns a child process for each incoming request.
cszh: 服务器为每个传入请求创建一个子进程。

cet4: We must make better use of our natural resources.
cet4zh: 我们必须更好地利用自然资源。
cs: Remember to release the resource in the finally block to avoid leaks.
cszh: 记得在 finally 块中释放资源以避免泄漏。

cet4: Research indicates that eating habits are changing fast.
cet4zh: 研究表明饮食习惯正在快速变化。
cs: The status code 200 indicates that the request was successful.
cszh: 状态码 200 表示请求成功。

def: n. 方法，途径 v. 接近，靠近
cet4: We need a new approach to solve this problem.
cet4zh: 我们需要一种新方法来解决这个问题。
cs: A recursive approach works well for tree traversal algorithms.
cszh: 递归方法非常适合树遍历算法。

def: v. 转移，转让 n. 转移，转换
cet4: He decided to transfer to another university.
cet4zh: 他决定转学到另一所大学。
cs: The file transfer protocol supports both binary and ASCII modes.
cszh: 文件传输协议支持二进制和 ASCII 两种模式。

cet4: The course teaches the basic principles of economics.
cet4zh: 这门课程教授经济学的基本原理。
cs: The single responsibility principle states that a class should have one reason to change.
cszh: 单一职责原则指出，一个类应该只有一个引起变化的原因。

def: v. 进行，实施；导电 n. 行为，举止
cet4: The scientist conducted an experiment in the lab.
cet4zh: 科学家在实验室里进行了一项实验。
cs: The metal casing helps conduct heat away from the CPU.
cszh: 金属外壳有助于将 CPU 的热量传导出去。

cet4: Climate change is a consequence of pollution.
cet4zh: 气候变化是污染的后果。
cs: Unhandled exceptions have serious consequences in production systems.
cszh: 未处理的异常在生产系统中会产生严重后果。

def: n. 调查，测量 v. 调查；审视
cet4: According to the survey, most students prefer online learning.
cet4zh: 根据调查，大多数学生更喜欢在线学习。
cs: We ran a user survey to understand how people interact with the API.
cszh: 我们做了一次用户调查，了解人们如何使用这个 API。

cet4: The stadium has a capacity of 50,000 people.
cet4zh: 这个体育场可容纳 5 万人。
cs: The connection pool has a max capacity of 100 concurrent connections.
cszh: 连接池的最大容量是 100 个并发连接。

def: n. 利益，好处 v. 受益
cet4: Regular exercise has many health benefits.
cet4zh: 经常锻炼有很多健康益处。
cs: The main benefit of caching is reduced database load.
cszh: 缓存的主要好处是减少数据库负载。

cet4: The organization distributed food to the victims.
cet4zh: 该组织向灾民分发了食物。
cs: The distributed system uses consensus to agree on the global state.
cszh: 分布式系统使用共识机制来达成全局状态一致。

cet4: Laws are made to regulate the behavior of citizens.
cet4zh: 法律是用来规范公民行为的。
cs: The rate limiter is used to regulate the number of API calls per second.
cszh: 限流器用于调节每秒的 API 调用次数。

cet4: She acquired a new skill through years of practice.
cet4zh: 她通过多年的练习获得了一项新技能。
cs: The thread must acquire the lock before accessing the shared data.
cszh: 线程在访问共享数据之前必须先获取锁。

cet4: It takes time to adapt to a new environment.
cet4zh: 适应新环境需要时间。
cs: The adapter pattern lets incompatible interfaces work together.
cszh: 适配器模式让不兼容的接口能够协同工作。

cet4: Everyone should contribute to protecting the environment.
cet4zh: 每个人都应该为保护环境做出贡献。
cs: Feel free to contribute to the open-source project via pull requests.
cszh: 欢迎通过 pull request 为这个开源项目贡献代码。

cet4: They resolved the conflict through negotiation.
cet4zh: 他们通过谈判解决了冲突。
cs: The DNS resolver will resolve the domain name to an IP address.
cszh: DNS 解析器会将域名解析为 IP 地址。

def: n. 替代品 v. 替代，替换
cet4: You can substitute olive oil for butter in this recipe.
cet4zh: 在这个食谱中你可以用橄榄油代替黄油。
cs: We can substitute the mock object for the real dependency in tests.
cszh: 在测试中我们可以用 mock 对象替代真实依赖。
